nodes.label: Markdown-to-Lexical JSON Conversion
nodes.rationale: Use @payloadcms/richtext-lexical's $convertFromMarkdownString with a headless Lexical editor instance on the CMS Engine server side (Next.js API route), not in the browser. Server-side conversion ensures correct node resolution using the full Payload editor config without shipping server-only config/node types to browser.

nodes.label: SSE Streaming Architecture
nodes.rationale: Two-hop SSE relay architecture: Content Authoring Service (FastAPI StreamingResponse) -> CMS Engine (Next.js API route proxying SSE, adding auth & tenant scoping) -> Browser (fetch with ReadableStream for POST bodies).

nodes.label: LangChain Image Generation Tool
nodes.rationale: Define a generate_image LangChain tool in the Content Authoring Service. The tool calls DALL-E/Stability AI, returns a temp URL, and emits SSE. CMS Engine stream-downloads the image to Payload Media collection to prevent OOM errors.

nodes.label: DraftingSession Locking and Lifecycle
nodes.rationale: Implement single-user lock via database-level unique constraint (partial unique index on tenant, contentType where status = 'active') + beforeChange hook. 10-minute inactivity timeout transitions to expired status, retaining data in a 24-hour recovery window before permanent purge.

nodes.label: Rate Limiting Strategy
nodes.rationale: Application-level rate limiting (10 AI requests/minute/user) in CMS Engine proxy using a Postgres-backed sliding window counter in a global (non-tenant-scoped) collection (AIRateLimits) with a compound index on (userId, timestamp).

nodes.label: Auto-Save Strategy
nodes.rationale: Debounced client-side auto-save (500ms after last change) via PATCH /api/drafting-sessions/:id. Saves rich-text body directly as Lexical JSON. Pausing generation triggers immediate auto-save of partial streamed text.

nodes.label: Version Snapshot Strategy
nodes.rationale: Store snapshots as a JSON array field (versions) on the DraftingSession document, capped at the last 10 versions. Rollback is executed server-side via dedicated POST /api/ai-drafting/sessions/[id]/rollback.

nodes.label: Atomic Promotion Transaction Safety
nodes.rationale: Wrap ContentItem creation and DraftingSession deletion in a single database transaction (payload.db.beginTransaction) to ensure atomicity. If either fails, neither persists.

nodes.label: StyleModifier Collection Design
nodes.rationale: Tenant-scoped collection style-modifiers containing name, description, systemPrompt, and isDefault tone checkbox, injected verbatim into LLM context.

nodes.label: AIAuditLog Collection Design
nodes.rationale: Dedicated tenant-scoped ai-audit-logs collection to track prompt/completion tokens, duration, model, provider, and estimated cost in USD microdollars.

nodes.label: Content Drafting Bounded Context
nodes.rationale: Create a new content_drafting bounded context under src/domain/content_drafting/ with value objects ContentDraft and DraftField, complying with strict Domain-Driven Design principles.

nodes.label: Locale Awareness
nodes.rationale: Locale is a first-class parameter passed throughout the request chain. AI drafts and refines strictly in the current active locale selected in the editor UI. Markdown-to-Lexical conversion uses activeLocale.

nodes.label: API Route Placement
nodes.rationale: Custom AI proxy and session routes are placed outside the app/(payload)/ route group, under app/api/ to avoid routing conflicts with Payload's catch-all route.
